brief: Wildfires in France and Spain force mass evacuations, Iran conflict escalates with oil prices topping $100, and AI advances raise legal questions in music creation.
news_summary: Wildfires rage in France and Spain, forcing tens of thousands to evacuate tourist areas, while US-Iran conflict drives oil prices above $100 and new global tariffs take effect. AI music creation tools and Gen Z-led protests in India blur digital boundaries.
papers_summary: Papers explore usability of conversational AI, wearable creative tools for fiction writing, and public health data workflows, alongside political visualization and ethics in dementia care.

en.brief: Wildfires in France and Spain force mass evacuations, Iran conflict escalates with oil prices topping $100, and AI advances raise legal questions in music creation.
en.news_summary: Wildfires rage in France and Spain, forcing tens of thousands to evacuate tourist areas, while US-Iran conflict drives oil prices above $100 and new global tariffs take effect. AI music creation tools and Gen Z-led protests in India blur digital boundaries.
en.papers_summary: Papers explore usability of conversational AI, wearable creative tools for fiction writing, and public health data workflows, alongside political visualization and ethics in dementia care.

zh.brief: 今日重点：美国以强迫劳动为由对60个贸易伙伴加征关税，白宫指控中国AI公司窃取技术；法国野火导致数万人疏散，油价突破100美元。研究显示年轻女性2型糖尿病增加，以及为什么你总在凌晨三点醒来。
zh.news_summary: 美国对60个贸易伙伴征10%-12.5%关税，7月24日生效；白宫指控中国月之暗面窃取Anthropic技术；法国野火致数万人撤离，油价破100美元；胡塞武装威胁曼德海峡航运；香港胡志伟英国机场险被遣返。
zh.papers_summary: 今日论文聚焦AI可用性与透明性：大型语言模型使对话式产品顾问流畅但不透明；智能眼镜上的可穿戴AI辅助创意写作；以及用于临床工作流的HIPAA合规AI增强LIMS架构。

todays_image.caption: The Fair Mount Company Cape, a historic coastal landmark in a vintage image, and the French tourist spot being evacuated both represent beautiful natural areas now contrasted by the threat of destruction—one by time, the other by fire.
todays_image.title: Fair Mount Company Cape
